markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on client work, process updates, and new responsibilities.](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Hex Content Strategy:** The priority is a professional tone for Hex's technical audience, even if it means sacrificing some SEO-driven simplification. The goal is to help Hex tell its story more effectively.](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [**New Responsibilities:** Kalil will now own the end-to-end delivery process, including ensuring client-facing assets are correct and providing a Thursday delivery update to enable Matt's Friday recap.](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [**Process Standardization:** A new Notion system for recurring tasks is in development to provide structure and free up time from ad-hoc planning.](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
  - [**"Red Flags" Clarified:** Client health flags are for internal awareness of changes (e.g., personnel, renewal status), not a signal of churn risk.](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=1076.0)

## Topics

### Hex Account Strategy & Content Tuning

  - [**Primary Issue:** Previous content used an "infantilizing" tone, which violated Hex's guidelines for its professional, technical audience.](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [**New Editorial Directive:**](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
      - **Priority \#1:** Professional tone.
      - **Priority \#2:** SEO optimization.
  - [**Rationale:** The goal is to help Hex, a technical team, tell its story more effectively by simplifying complex topics without being condescending.](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
  - [**Process for Expertise Gaps:**](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
      - [It's acceptable to miss nuances on technical topics (e.g., old vs. new data viz techniques).](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
      - [This creates an opportunity for Hex to provide feedback and educate, which improves the AI engine over time.](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**New POC:** Jess is leaving; Rachel is the new POC. Matt will meet with Rachel to align on strategy and get a clear roadmap (e.g., new product launch in late Feb).](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)

### Process Standardization & New Responsibilities

  - [**New Notion System:**](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Standardize recurring tasks across accounts to provide clear expectations and free up time from ad-hoc planning.](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
      - [**Status:** In development; full rollout with calibration is planned for a few weeks from now.](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
  - [**New Responsibilities for Kalil:**](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
      - [**Thursday Update:** Provide a delivery status update for each client to Matt.](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
          - [**Why:** Enables Matt to prepare his Friday client recap and finish work on time.](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
      - [**End-to-End Delivery Ownership:** Ensure all client-facing assets are correct and accessible.](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
  - [**Fathom Sync Recordings:**](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
      - [**Recommendation:** Review recordings/notes for Immubit and Innerwell syncs.](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
      - [**Why:** To stay informed on account strategy and identify content-related insights.](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

### Client Health Flags

  - [**Purpose:** Internal signals for awareness of changes, not a direct indicator of churn risk.](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=1076.0)
  - [**Immubit (Red Flag):**](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=1076.0)
      - [**Why:** In renewal phase and hiring a separate paid ads agency.](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)
      - [**Impact:** None on our organic content delivery.](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
  - [**Hex (Red Flag):**](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=1076.0)
      - [**Why:** Personnel change (Jess → Rachel).](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
      - [**Impact:** None on our content delivery.](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)

### Innerwell Pipeline

  - [**Decision:** Kalil will test adding a categorization step to the existing general-use pipeline instead of building a new one from scratch.](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kalil:**](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
      - [Test adding a categorization step to the general pipeline for Innerwell.](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
      - [Provide a delivery status update to Matt by EOD Thursday.](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
      - [Assume ownership of end-to-end delivery (asset correctness, client access).](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
      - [Review Fathom sync recordings for Immubit and Innerwell.](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [**Matt:**](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
      - [Meet with Rachel (new Hex POC) to align on strategy and roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/6y6uiATPoWobfhVzdLx9XduJe99ye3Ed?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
